Sources.Title: Joshua J. Berk — participant-uploaded DirectLabs Labcorp results
Personal Genome Project — Joshua J. Berk public profile hu9EDB77

TranscriptionNotes: The Personal Genome Project profile explicitly identifies Joshua J. Berk and labels the DirectLabs report as participant-supplied data.
The Labcorp report identifies Joshua Berk and assigns the complete blood count, comprehensive metabolic panel, and cardiac CRP to one order collected on 30 July 2015 at 10:49.

AgeYears was calculated from the date of birth and collection date shown in the voluntarily public report, rounded to two decimals; the date of birth is not republished here. The report also states age 25.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
